usage: gui_set_legend [-help] [-display_range {x y}] [-enable_max_value {true false}] [-enable_min_value {true false}] [-legend_location {ne nw se sw}] [-reset <string>] [-show_legend_on_layout {true false}] -type {inst_density pin_density timing_map metal_density route_congestion temperature} [-value_range {x y}]

options.name: -display_range
options.description: Specify the display range in {min max} format

options.name: -enable_max_value
options.description: Enable the max value of display range

options.name: -enable_min_value
options.description: Enable the min value of display range

options.name: -reset
options.description: Reset the settings. Use "-reset all" to reset all options. Use "-reset -display_range|-value_range|-show_legend_on_layout|-legend_location|-enable_min_value|-enable_max_value" to reset the specified option.

options.name: -type
options.description: {inst_density pin_density timing_map metal_density route_congestion temperature} Legend type

options.name: -value_range
options.description: Specify the value range in {min max} format
